title: Rekindled Combat
description:
A fork of Better Combat created to be Vanilla Friendly.
Includes attack animations, dual wielding, improved weapon hitboxes, and Quality of Life changes.
body:
![Rekindled Combat Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8437b6adc9f01933edeb6bc1be552fd28d89ccb_0.webp)

## Rekindled Combat is a Vanilla-Friendly fork of Better Combat

**Want Vanilla Friendly weapons with attack animations to go alongside this mod? Download [Fresh Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/fresh-weaponry)!**

## ✨Features✨

### Instant Attacks
Upswing is set to 0, meaning attacks are instant

### Consistent Movement
Movement Speed stays the same while attacking

### Improved Attack Hitboxes
Increased Weapon swing hitboxes and all hitbox angles are equal across all weapons

### Default Attack Range
Increased swords and other weapons attack range is set to default Vanilla value of 3 blocks

### Vanilla Sword Swing
Attack animations for Vanilla swords are similar to Vanilla unlike custom weapons

### Attack Swing Animations
One-handed, two-handed, and dual wielding attack animations

### Quality of Life Changes
Hold to attack and swing through grass

**---------------------**
### Dependencies

Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator), and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for Fabric

**---------------------**
### Credit

This mod is a fork of [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) created by [ZsoltMolnarrr](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)

You may use Rekindled Combat in modpacks.

## Usage

This mod is meant for a modpack I am currently developing called "Rekindled Overhaul"
